Technology

We aim to enable you to follow technological developments both in Turkey and in the world and we care about your ability to conduct scientific research in the field of technology. Our laboratories are constantly updated to develop scientific curiosity and research skills.

Are you ready to shape your career in technology by combining your theoretical knowledge with practical applications?

Why?

Specialization in planning and managing technological innovations

Gaining software and hardware development skills

Training qualified personnel and managers in the field of technology

Universal academic education with original and impactful values

Supporting the development of individuals both professionally and socially
